narrative:
Mendon-Union (precinct in Mercer County) has 875 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
